MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANTS INFAC INDIA GROUP, LLC, VERNON R. LOUCKS, JR., AND CHARLES LOUCKS MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF NAGANUMA'S DEPOSITION AND PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AND FOR SANCTIONS.

APPEARANCES: Steven J. Serratore, Esq. of Serratore Law, P.C. 626/577-4900 for defts & moving parties; no other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - Granted, no opposition filed. Plaintiff to pay defendants $2000.00 in sanctions within 15 days of notice of entry of the order. Order signed in open court. Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Not reported
